definition: Compact 1D pressure balance/root that relates buoyancy drive to modeled losses.
assumptions: Steady single-phase loop-scale reduction; geometry and closure slots known separately.

definition: Thermal-density buoyancy integral around the loop.
assumptions: Density is evaluated from chosen property lane; loop elevation path is known.
admission_note: Source/property choice must be labeled before fitting.

definition: Segment and local-loss pressure model slot for 1D loop reduction.
assumptions: Requires pressure basis velocity basis component isolation and recovery policy.
admission_note: No global multiplier or negative K is admitted by this equation.

latex_form: \Delta p_{\mathrm{static}}=\Delta p_{\mathrm{hyd}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{kin}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{dist,dev}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{section/cluster}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{transient}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{res}}
definition: Current Chapter 4 decomposition separating hydrostatic kinetic straight/developing section/cluster transient and residual pressure terms.
assumptions: Reduced CFD pressure diagnostics must carry plane and basis metadata.
admission_note: Diagnostic decomposition; component coefficient admission still gated.

definition: Finite-segment energy ledger separating source and loss owners before closure fitting.
assumptions: Steady segment balance; terms must be assigned by evidence class and legal runtime status.
admission_note: Residual term cannot be silently absorbed into Nu.

definition: Fluid+walls thermal resistance representation for passive/external heat loss.
assumptions: Thermal resistance owners must be separated; external radiation/convection may already be embedded in CFD wall BC diagnostics.
admission_note: Internal Nu must not absorb wall conduction external convection radiation cooler or passive-wall residual.

definition: Test-section source/loss slot for separating electrical source from external loss path.
assumptions: Requires source-side sign convention and external-resistance provenance.
admission_note: Slot is diagnostic/pending until source-side accounting is admitted.

definition: CFD evidence is a high-fidelity computational reference used for model-form selection diagnostics and target construction, not experimental validation.
assumptions: No experimental validation data are admitted here.
admission_note: Allowed as thesis framing; do not call validation.

definition: Final target architecture with fluid pressure/thermal lanes plus wall/material/external boundary representation.
admission_note: Target form; not a final calibrated model.

definition: A closure or term has passed split discipline source/property checks runtime-legal input checks and uncertainty/admission gates for its intended use.
admission_note: Most Ch1-Ch4 foundations are architecture; many result closures remain diagnostic or blocked.

definition: Evidence may explain mechanism residual ownership model-form limits or future-study design but cannot be used as a predictive runtime closure.
assumptions: Diagnostic evidence may come from CFD reductions figures or protected rows.
admission_note: Must be labeled clearly in prose and tables.

definition: Use of prohibited target-derived or protected information as an input to a claimed predictive runtime model.
assumptions: Forbidden sources include CFD mdot realized wallHeatFlux imposed cooler duty validation temperatures row-local pressure targets holdout and external-test data.
admission_note: Core methodological contribution is preventing this leakage.

definition: Explicit label for the literature source property model pressure basis heat-transfer basis and validity envelope used by a model slot.
assumptions: The source must match geometry flow regime basis and reduction target before admission.
admission_note: Literature equation presence is not TAMU admission.

definition: Pressure residual assigned to a section or cluster when component isolation and recovery requirements are not met.
assumptions: Requires pressure basis and velocity basis metadata.
admission_note: Do not rename as component K without additional evidence.

definition: Segment-local marker that ordinary single-throughflow Nu f_D or K assumptions may be invalid due to reverse flow or exchange behavior.
assumptions: Requires diagnostic metric or figure evidence for use in results chapters.
admission_note: Supports model-form limits; not an admitted closure by itself.
